programme.title: Only One Can Remain
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.” On the island, Lloyd learns his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen. They meet the playfully deceitful ruler who tells them they are in a tournament where ‘Only one can remain'. When they are spoiled by their posh quarters, they are surprised to find the game is already afoot: Last person to find a Jade Blade is out. After an epic battle of elemental powers, Kai steals the last one from Karlof, who is kicked out of the tournament through a trap door leading to the unknown. Later that night, the Ninja go in search for Zane but come across an underground temple where Chen and his Anacondrai Worshippers steal Karlof's power. Is this a fighting tournament, or a ploy to steal everyone's power?

programme.title: Versus
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. In order to find Zane and get to the bottom of Chen's mysterious plot the Ninja need to stay in the tournament and get past the first round. Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. Meanwhile, new Titanium Ninja Zane is locked in a dungeon and has a nightmare about a ferocious Ice Dragon. Guided by the voice of Pixal, he embraces his new technology and escapes his cell, only to find Pixal hasn't fared as well. Though she has no body, he inputs her CPU into his, uniting the two. In an attempt to prevent Jay versus Cole, the Ninja enlist the Master of Mind to help, but are unable to prevent the inevitable. In a gladiator battle, Jay and Cole put aside their feud to throw the match --enraging Chen to send Cole down the mysterious trap door. Lastly, Nya sees Zane's beacon is working again and is on the hunt for them.

programme.title: Winds Of Change
programme.desc: Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. When the Ninja's powers mysteriously disappear, they return to the Tea Farm and are attacked by Lloyd, who is possessed by the spirit of Moro, the Master of Wind! After a harrowing escape on the Bounty, Wu tells the Ninja they weren't his first pupils!Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only to discover it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. After the Ninja save a small fishing village, Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain but Kai promises to watch over him. When Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm,

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja – and the Ninja discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, leaving them to crash. When the dust settles, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja. They discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. In order to save Lloyd and get their powers back, they set off to find the first clue – the scroll to the lost martial art of ‘Airjitzu'. On their way to get it, they have a run in with one of Moro's ghost generals Wraythe, and discover water is the key to stopping them. Meanwhile, Nya discovers a family secret – her mother was a Water Ninja and with training, she could be one too.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: The Fortrex And The Furious
programme.desc: In a massive chase around Knighton, the NEXO-Knights attempt to keep the Book of Betrayal out of the Book of Monster's grip. But the evil book is persistent. Will he get the final piece of his evil puzzle? We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.” Suddenly, they realize Monsters – led by Magmar and the super-mad Book of Monster – are after them! Clay retreats with Jestro and the Book of Betrayal to rendezvous with the other Knights at the Fortrex. The Fortrex isn't fast enough they'll need their own vehicles. They decide that they need to split up and go in multiple directions to make the monsters expend their resources on a chase. It's a huge chase, being covered like a crazy news event by the Knighton News Network. We see a montage of the monsters stopping and capturing all the Knights vehicles: Aaron, Macy, Lance…finally Axl. However, as they do, they realize that the Knights have used Squirebots in Jestro Fan Jester hats (from the vendor at the comedy club in 108) as decoys. They think Axl has the Book of Betrayal in his BRICK containment unit, but it turns out to be the Ned Knightly Comic from episode 203. The Monsters finally corner Clay, who has the real Jestro and Book of Betrayal in his sword vehicle. Before Clay can protest, Jestro pushes the launch button and fires off Clay in the vehicle's rocket sword. The monsters race off with Jestro, leaving the shocked Clay fearing for his friend. Now, Magmar tells the Book of Monsters, they only need to get BOB. Clay makes his way back to the Fortrex and tells what has happened. They decide they must get to the Redoubt of Ruination in the Lava Lands and try to save Jestro. Meanwhile, we see, INTERCUT, a scene where Merlok 2.0 and the Book of Monsters explain the Books of Evil, how they were created and what the BOM will use them for. Merlok, back in the day, split the evil MONSTRUX into 10 magic books to keep him from ever being a threat. Only, he didn't destroy the books…and now the BOM has them and Monstrux can come back into the world! Meanwhile, the BOM has set up the huge, ceremonial arena at their HQ so they can have the ceremony to bring Monstrux back into the world. Jestro realizes he's been a pawn of the Book of Monsters. Jestro says he'll never get the Book of Betrayal…the Knights have it. In the last scene, we see Clay taking the Book of Betrayal from the Fortrex, climbing into his vehicle and driving towards…the Redoubt of Ruination! Has the Book of Betrayal worked its evil magic on him?!

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: Short Sheeped
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King, which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.

programme.title: The Grim Escape
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to save Logan from the Shadowkeep's dungeon, but the liberators soon become the prisoners in a nightmarish twist of fate.

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
programme.desc: So the final puzzle forces ninja to question the true meaning of the Green Ninja Prophecy. Solving the puzzles releases a new peril for the Ninja to face. Will memories of their greatest victories be enough to defeat it?

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Karoake and Music Special
programme.desc: LEGO Friends are having fun with Karaoke and music.

programme.title: Celebrating The Special Day
programme.desc: Here, the girls go on an adventurous balloon ride. Watch how much fun they have.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot heads to Cybertron to warn Galvatron while battle rages on.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A prophecy wounds a hero and triggers a long-awaited Optimus-Megatron battle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Dark Energon eruptions alert Autobots to a deeper threat within Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobots seek to stop Unicron without destroying Earth help comes unexpectedly.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus and Megatron fight deep underground to stop Unicron's awakening.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons discover the lost civilization of Atlantis in the depths of the ocean.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron gains control over most of the Autobot forces.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobots Grapple and Hoist plan to build a solar energy tower to collect energy from the sun.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Decepticons and Insecticons raid a base for valuable data.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron launches a full-scale assault on the people of Earth.

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jungle Jitterbug: The rain forest of South America is not a place where Vanity Smurf would like to spend his life. And then he starts dancing madly when he gets jungle fever. His dance will have strange results.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Heart: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Like It Or Smurf It: The Smurfs are on a paradise Pacific Island. Well, not exactly paradise, since there is a very active volcano, on which a very active Hefty Smurf risks his life as well as Smurfette's!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Funny Bone: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Romeo And Smurfette: Spring has the Smurfs all competing for Smurfette's affection and Gargamel decides to put a spell on her to help him capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf intervenes and with the help of the foolish Azrael he foils the wizard's plans.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Rival: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette's Bewitching Friendship: Smurfs try to avoid contact with humans. But this time, Sassette is happy to be friends with a little witch called Melina, whose spells often end up in disaster. And anyway, are witches really human? At any rate, wizards such as Gargamel are.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Little Big Smurf: Smurfs would make delicious meals for the evil wizard Gargamel if it weren't for two things: they're difficult to catch and they're so tiny. Now, suppose there were a formula to change these bite-size snacks into big, juicy square blue meals... Gargamel has an idea...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Astrosmurf: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Put Upon Puppy: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Where The Wild Smurfs Are: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He'd be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha's dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Rabbids are panicking!
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, two Rabbids become convinced that their boss has turned into a balloon.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: The Rabbids are escaping!
programme.desc: John the scientist is trapped inside a rabbid's body, and gets thrown into the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids are morons.
programme.desc: In order to get a little, Hibernation Rabbid divides the Junkyard into two separate zones with a border fence.

programme.title: Dr Mad Rabbid is out of control!
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid has found a great way to become invisible, now he just needs a guinea pig to test it.

programme.title: The Rabbids lead the investigation.
programme.desc: When a thief robs a piece from Hibernation Rabbid's Teleporta-TV, Investigator Rabbid leads the investigation

programme.title: The Rabbids make their cinema.
programme.desc: A cowboy rabbid has come back to town looking for the outlaw rabbid who destroyed his rocking horse.

programme.title: Revenge of the Rabbids.
programme.desc: Blasted into the Polar Regions when his secret HQ explodes, Evil Rabbid raises a penguin army!

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: The Rabbids are having fun!
programme.desc: The Rabbids find a cellphone on the sidewalk. They're fascinated by the ring tone.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in the Moon
programme.desc: A sculptor inadvertently compresses the rabbids' rocket ship.

programme.title: The Rabbids VS The Animals.
programme.desc: In the country, two Rabbids become fascinated by a fly.

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie. But this time an honest lot distributed the roles. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Will Rosie endure mother's everyday life?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: All the world's a stage
programme.desc: The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. It's just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage..

programme.title: Horrifying Story Of Grandmother And Grandson
programme.desc: It happens that grown-up people have their own fears! For example, one grandmother was very afraid not to please her grandson. Whatever she cooked- nothing was good enough for him. Once she tried to give him a tomato, but he just threw it towards the wall! Grandma was very upset and left the house. And so he was left alone and scared- there was no one home! Much fear he had suffered until his grandmother came back! This terrible trick taught him a worthy lesson so nevertheless he was cranky ever after and ate with a terrible appetite!

programme.title: A Ghost Bike Saga Which Makes You Shiver
programme.desc: You think no one could ever be afraid of a bike...Today, you will hear an incredible... and amazing heartbreaking story... about a bicycle! There was one boy called Gosha, who was very upset when he got bicycle for his birthday as he once imagined himself rushing down the street riding that huge two-wheeled scary monster! But in reality it's so simple to ride a bike without any worries...isn't it?

programme.title: Super Scary Story Of A Little Boy Who Was Afraid Of Washing
programme.desc: One boy was so afraid of the water that he stopped washing himself and turned into a piggy! All his buddies ran away from him scared! But in the end he overcame his fear and began to wash his face and hands as he realized that the water can be safe and fun! The boy was very brave and even won a swimming competition!

programme.title: Horrible True Story Of How A Boy Was Transferred To Another School
programme.desc: He was terrified so much because he thought that another strange school is full of monster-looking teachers, gym classes where you have to fight without rules and classmates-bullies! But in reality there was nothing to be afraid of because all the schools are practically the same- with normal classmates and teachers who are always ready to make you feel comfortable!Today you will hear a story which you haven't heard before…about one boy who was transferred to another school!

programme.title: Creepy Tale About Useful Inventions
programme.desc: Here is another spooky story about useful inventions that might nonetheless ruin your life…just imagine…what if there is mega brain who wants to conquer the Earth with some mechanical monsters?! You might think it's a joke, but there are so many gadgets around you, can you guarantee that you are safe? Ok, ok, relax, Masha will find a way out! Oh, yeah!

programme.title: Soul Freezing Tale Of Grim Forest And Tiny Timid Bug
programme.desc: All children are afraid of the dark. Masha was afraid of it too and had to sit with a torch all night long! But once upon a time she came up with the tale about a tiny bug, which lived in the woods and was so afraid of the dark, that every rustle made its heart tremble! The bug suffered a lot until he realized that all tiny things you see in the dark just seem to be frightful and fear makes no sense at all!

programme.title: Gloomy Story About The Darkest Dreams
programme.desc: All children are keen on computer games! Everyone likes to shoot a couple of monsters before going to sleep. Tolik also liked to play shooters until the monsters attack him in reality in order to commit the revenge! Or…was it just a dream? Let's see...

programme.title: Caliph Stork
programme.desc: This tale tells us about one Caliph from the East, who used to sit all day long in front of the window and listen to the birds chirping. Caliph was very powerful, but there was one thing that disappointed him - he could not understand the birds' language. Poor Caliph began to cry and no one was able to make him laugh. One day a strange dwarf came to Caliph. He promised to help him to turn him into a stork. Caliph agreed and turned into a stork. Meanwhile, the dwarf sat on the throne and proclaimed himself Caliph. The poor Stork burst into tears and begged the dwarf to restore his human appearance and kingship. Nothing would have saved Caliph, if only one little parrot helped Caliph to bewitch the dwarf and return the human appearance to him. Masha concludes that it is very important to learn foreign languages.

programme.title: Jack and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: There lived a boy called Jack. He was so poor that no girl would want to marry him. One day he went to the market to sell the cow and buy himself a suit. On his way to the market Jack met an old man, who offered him to buy a cow for a bean seed. Jack agreed and went home. There he met his mother, who realized that money was spent for nothing and threw away the seed out from the window. At night, when Jack and his mother were sleeping, the seed sprouted and grew into a tall tree. In the morning, Jack has decided to climb this tree. He attempted several times but each time he fell down. Suddenly he noticed a saw a plait hanging next to him from the tree. He pulled it down and suddenly a beautiful girl fell right into his arms. They got married and lived happily ever after. To conclude, only selfless deeds can bring true happiness.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish. One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.

programme.title: The Valiant Little Tailor
programme.desc: This fairy tale is about one little and witty tailor, who had a chance to defeat the giant and obtain a fridge full of sweets. So he ate all of them at once. Then he decided to get out on the street, but could not, as he overate and got stuck in the door. This story teaches us a vital lesson not to be greedy and eat too much otherwise we might get into a messy situation.

programme.title: Cinderella
programme.desc: Masha tells her version of the fairy tale about the poor girl called Cinderella. She lived with her stepmother who forced her to work till dawn. One day the stepmother asked Cinderella to crack three bags of nuts. The poor girl would never have managed to complete this task, if only the fairy had appeared in front of her. By magic, the fairy emerged and conjured her Nutcracker, who helped Cinderella to crack all the nuts very fast. The Cinderella was so happy that she took the Nutcracker with her to the ball, which took place in the royal palace. The Nutcracker helped the King to save the palace from rats and Cinderella was so thankful that she kissed him in his cheek. In this very moment the Nutcracker turned into a handsome prince! The moral of the story is that we should not judge the others by their appearance.

programme.title: Pasta la Vista
programme.desc: Who is the best cook in all the forest? Masha has no doubts as to how to correctly answer this question. And the proof is right before you: macaroni cooked by Masha herself. What can be simpler? Only Dasha is somehow sure that Masha's final product is inedible. As usual, Bear will have to solve the girls' dispute, as usual.

programme.title: New Kids on the Block!
programme.desc: Masha enthusiastically plays with her "dolls", but Rosie wants to be independent. She trades places with wolves and now they are under Masha's care. Rosie enjoys adult life, but everything is not that simple ...

programme.title: Surprise! Surprise!
programme.desc: The wolves come up with a new idea how to get a stable and nutritious food source… they rob a poultry farm and get a…rooster. Meanwhile Masha and the hare arrange a real egg hunt for all their friends and neighbours! All forest dwellers are very excited to get chocolate eggs except for the wolves who long for some real food… Masha decides to help poor guys and arranges a splendid dinner!

programme.title: Time To Ride My Pony
programme.desc: The Bear's good friend, the Tiger, is back for a visit and they decide to spend the time together in an intellectual way – playing chess. Masha is immediately drawn into the game and to everyone's surprise, she outsmarts and outplays both the Bear and his friend with just one chess figure.

programme.title: Hold Your Breath
programme.desc: Bright summer day. Bear, while gathering berries, meets female bear in the forest and arranges a date with her. Returning home, he starts cleaning the house and baking a pie. Once the pie is done, the Bear decorates it with strawberries. Masha eats them before starting to hiccup. The Bear tries all manner of remedies from a medical encyclo-pedia to stop the hiccups. In the end, hiccups spread to everyone including all other forest in-habitants.

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: Mushroom Rain
programme.desc: Autumn forest is so wonderful. You can pick mushrooms, listen to birds singing ... But what if there are absolutely no mushrooms at all? Masha finds an original solution to this problem. Which one? Watch the episode and find out!

programme.title: Driving Lessons
programme.desc: Who wants to pimp a car? Then hurry up to stand in a queue! Why? Because in a new, 55th episode there are loads of unexpected things that happened in the forest: Masha appears as a first-rate mechanic , wolves who, obviously, decided to change their occupation appear as taxi drivers ... okay, okay… we should stop throwing spoilers around…watch everything yourself!

programme.title: Try, Try Again
programme.desc: A van with Monkeys arrived at the Bear's house. They invite everyone to test themselves with the help of an attraction - a power meter. The Bear is confident that he will easily win the main prize. But things didn't go according to plan. And now the main strongman of the forest cannot do without the help of his friends.

programme.title: Happy Harvest
programme.desc: Can you imagine Masha as a magical fairy? What magic could she create? Of course something enchanting and fantastic! Especially when the Bear decided to cheer the Female Bear and organize a masquerade ball! Masha put all her efforts to create a bright, memorable and very harvest party, but this magic evening couldn't survive without Masha's tricks…

programme.title: One-Hit Wonder
programme.desc: Masha decides to help the Bear to win the heart of his beloved Female Bear. To do so, Masha organizes her own rock band and shoots a music video. The hare plays on drums, the wolves play on piano and Masha rocks out on a guitar! This is something that the forest inhabitants have never seen before.

programme.title: Jam Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to harvest berries and to cook jam. This idea is literally up to Masha's taste. She tries everything. Afterwards she decides to play an astronaut by putting a glass jar on her head. The Bear tries to get her head out of the container and eventually he succeeds only to discover his own paw inside the same jar. He spends the remaining day in attempts to free his hand.

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: God save the queen
programme.desc: Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode.Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule. Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode.Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule.

programme.title: Sinister Saga Of A Sick Tummy And A Girl Who Was Afraid Of Doctors
programme.desc: Masha narrates a terrific story about one little girl who was afraid of doctors. And once upon a time she experienced one fantastic story…she decided to cook dinner for her dolls. She took some clay and made “meat balls” with “semolina porridge”. As the meal seemed tasty, Sima decided to eat a bit of her dinner too… And so she lies in her bad and feels a horrible stomachache. Nobody knows how long she would need to suffer, but when she woke up…she realized herself in hospital…near the real snow queen… who explained that medical treatment is not scary at all…though some other things are very fearsome! Oh yeah!

programme.title: Troubled Story About Baba-Yaga
programme.desc: A boy called Pasha was afraid of fairytale villains. He had read so many fairy tales that it got him really scared! Any trouble he faced was shifted to all kind of evil spirits… like Baba-Yaga. Only the courageous firefighters could assure Pasha that Baba-Yaga is not the reason for his troubles at all!

programme.title: Terrible Truth About Those Who Are Afraid To Be Little
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Grim Parable About Superstitious Girl
programme.desc: Some people happen to believe in all sorts of omens like black cats, wearing clothes inside out, prophetic dreams… Poor girl Lucy believed in that kind of stuff so much that was even afraid to go outside to play with her friends. And how could you go out if you were born in the year of Purple rabbit that promises…no matter what… You'll see…

programme.title: Terrible Legend About Thunder And Lightning
programme.desc: Masha tells an existing story about thunder and lighting and what might happen if the lighting suddenly catches you in the park…while you are enjoying your orange lemonade?

programme.title: God save the queen
programme.desc: Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode.Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule. Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode.Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule.

programme.title: My Cutie-Patootie
programme.desc: Masha wanted to get a pet - a hedgehog. But the hedgehog didn't want to be a pet and started to run away. What a stubborn hedgehog. But Masha is even more stubborn. He runs, she catches him. He runs again, she catches him again. And so in a circle, until she finally found in her house... a surprise! Watch the episode and see for yourself!

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: The Grand Piano Lesson
programme.desc: The bear finds a beautiful black piano in the forest. He happily takes it home, fixes and tunes it and begins to play some music. Masha couldn't help staying away from this lovely instrument. She decides to become a world famous pianist, she asks the Bear to teach her how to play the piano.

programme.title: The First Swallow
programme.desc: Do you know what ornithology is? This is a science that studies birds! Andit is also Dasha's new hobby. She comes to visit Masha and the Bear and discovers a new unique bird species! What is this amazing unusual bird? Hurry up and watch this new episode to find out!

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: The Bear mixes up in a very nasty gambling story! He is ready to spend all day long playing all kinds of computer games. He quit housekeeping, multiple hobbies and friends. It seems that the game is over, but Masha runs to help her best friend at the very last moment!

programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic loses his memory when Robotnik uses a hypnotic flower pollen on him, and tells him he's just an "ordinary" guy.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic vanishes mysteriously, Tails enlists the help of a bi-plane pilot named William Le' Duc, and Professor Von Schlemmer.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Lifestyles of the Sick and Twisted

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik forces her son to run for President of Mobius with Wes Weasley as his campaign manager.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog

programme.desc: Donkey Kong, Diddy and Funky find a map and soon, everyone wants to get the implied treasure. They all go on a treasure hunt and fight to get it.

programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City. There he is confronted by some local thugs Li Yan and the Bruiser Boys.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble KC Raceway

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Jungle Jump

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country From Zero to Hero

programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are on a cruise when the Egg Fort appears inside a glacier. As Sonic faces his foes, he receives some help from Knuckles.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash has a tough decision to make after encountering a group of wild Butterfree.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Aiming for his fourth badge, Ash challenges Saffron City Gym Leader Sabrina.

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After meeting a Hitmonchan, Ash and his Primeape enter a fighting competition.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends explore a power plant to search for the cause of an outage.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: The Indians are now a World Series contender. But last year's hunger is now replaced with complacency, and bad decisions by the new owner threaten to tear the team apart.

programme.title: Major League: Back To The Minors
programme.desc: A pitcher is about to be put out to pasture when he is given the opportunity to manage a team.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Class Rank
programme.desc: CLASS RANK is a funny and touching coming-of-age drama in the vein of Election, Easy A or Legally Blonde, from the director of Glee...

programme.title: Charming
programme.desc: A hilarious and music filled animation from the producer of 'Shrek'.

programme.title: Postman Pat: The Movie
programme.desc: Postman Pat, a mail carrier, lives an idyllic life in the quaint British town of Greendale. When a national talent TV show comes to town, Pat enters. But when he comes face-to-face with the temptations of money – can he resist?

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E4 The Yuck Factor - An evil villain shrinks himself down to microscopic size and enters Jerry's body – controlling him and forcing him to do evil things. The girls have to go in after the villain to save not only to save their boss, but also the world. In a b-story, Alex has to dissect a frog in science class.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.sub-title: S2:E5 It's How You Play the Game
programme.desc: S2:E5 It's How You Play the Game - When the team from tropical Zanzibar begins sweeping the winter Olympics, the girls are sent in to investigate. What they discover is an evil coach who's engineering super-athletes by injecting dangerous, performance enhancing hormones into their bodies!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E6 Here Comes the Sun - The spies investigate a former beach bunny beauty queen who devises a device which selectively intensifies the sun's rays on certain parts of the world – thereby, subjecting those people to severe heat and sun. The villain then sells her 2000 SPF sun block to those affected.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E7 Green With N.V - When men all over the world abruptly and unexpectedly leave their wives, the spies are called-in to investigate. What they discover is Possession, a new French perfume created by Natalie Valentine. The perfume's secret ingredient? Natalie Valentine's pheromones.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.sub-title: S2:E8 Boys Bands Will be Boys Bands
programme.desc: S2:E8 Boys Bands Will be Boys Bands - The Spies investigate the hottest new pop band, Teensicle, when several band members begin to mysteriously disappear. When the band members resurface seemingly safe and sound, the spies detect strange changes in their personalities.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E9 I, Dude - When tsunamis begin to wipe out tourist spots/resort areas all over the world, WOOHP sends in the spies. What they discover is that the tsunamis are man made – an evil plot by ex-surfer Frankie Dude to restore the beaches to their natural state and original “surfability.”

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E10 Mommies Dearest - It's Mother's Day and the spies decide to take their moms to an exclusive spa to celebrate. Once they get there, however, the girls notice that their moms have begun to act quite strangely. In fact, it quickly becomes apparent to the spies that their moms are trying to kill them!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E11 Zooney World - When the children of the world start to disappear, the spies uncover a sinister television show and a host who is training the children to take over the adult world. In a b-story, Clover somehow has to complete her mission while being grounded to her bedroom.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E12 First Brat - The girls are assigned babysitting duty at the White House for the President's 11-year-old daughter, Madison. At first Madison seems to be a perfect angel, but, as soon as her dad is out of sight, she turns into a major brat.

programme.title: Pets 2
programme.desc: Best buddies, Bella the laid-back cat, Bagel the goofy dog, and Alvin the opinionated parrot are hanging out on their cherished couch watching the best show on TV, Pets! Bella is particularly excited because today's episode of Pets is all about the coolest and most mysterious pet around: the cat!

programme.title: Crisis Point
programme.desc: (2012) Thriller with Rhona Mitra. Still haunted by a failed negotiation, a psychologist is thrust back into high-stakes action when her sister is taken hostage, forcing her to face her greatest fears.

programme.title: Dating to Kill
programme.desc: (2019) Cradle-robbing thriller with Clare Kramer. Jessica is shocked when her daughter starts dating an older man. But that soon turns to terror when she discovers her lethal connection to him...

programme.title: Gone Daughter Gone
programme.desc: (2020) Suspenseful thriller starring Andrea Bogart. When her daughter is abducted, Shannon decides to take matters into her own hands, putting her on a collision course with a deadly kidnapper...

programme.title: Girlfriend Killer
programme.desc: A businesswoman who creates the perfect marriage proposals for wealthy men, becomes the target of a crazy client's obsession. Starring Barbie Castro (2017)

programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A troubled young man hijacks a bus load of school children. Meanwhile Detective Amber Cross (Alaina Huffman), battling with her own demons and issues, is called in to negotiate

programme.title: Little Buddha

programme.title: Hours

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: Spy Dog
programme.desc: Toby appears to be an ordinary dog living the simple put life, but unbeknownst to his family, he moonlights as secret government operative, Agent Toby Barks. AKA Agent Toby Barks

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: في العالم الجديد، يصل حاكم إسباني جديد إلى مقاطعة نويفا أراجون، التي تحت سيطرة مشددة من قبل العقيد الفاسد هويرتا. مصمماً على جلب العدالة، يتولى دور بطل مقنع.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: يذهب داد لونغوورث وريا إلى بنك في المكسيك، ولكن داد يهرب بالنقود، تاركاً ريو ليقع في يد الروراليس. بعد خمس سنوات، يهرب ريو ويهدف إلى الانتقام من داد، لكن الأمور تتعقد عندما يقع في حب ابنة زوج داد.

programme.title: Killer App
programme.desc: A young hacker creates an "antisocial" networking app that matches enemies instead of friends. When her enemies start turning up dead, she must uncover who or what is behind it before it's too late

programme.title: Eaten By Lions
programme.desc: A hilarious and heart-warming story of half brothers Omar and Pete, who embark on a journey from Bradford to Blackpool to find Omar's real Dad.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A teenage boy's incredible werewolf powers improve the quality of his life in dramatic and hilarious ways.

programme.title: Assassins Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A cop is assigned to the neighborhood where he grew up, where an old secret threatens to destroy his family.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: Taylor Lautner stars in a pulse-pounding action heist film set in the world of parkour.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: After his family is kidnapped, a young Wall Street trader is confronted by the people responsible.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A cop is assigned to the neighborhood where he grew up, where an old secret threatens to destroy his family.

programme.title: Merry Good Enough
programme.desc: Lucy Raulie has always had a complicated relationship with her family, but when her mother disappears on Christmas Eve, the dysfunctional family hit a new all-time low. Aided by her reluctant siblings in an attempt to bring the family back together, the Raulie kids may get more than they bargained for when their eccentric father, George, also shows up to "help" in the search for their wayward mom. A razor-sharp and delightfully heartwarming festive comedy, packed with classic Christmas songs and a stand-out ensemble cast, including Joel Murray (Mad Men), Sawyer Spielberg (Masters of the Air), Susan Gallagher (Cobra Kai), Neil Casey (Ghostbusters, Avenue 5), Comfort Clinton (Billions, FBI), Sophie von Haselberg (Give Me Pity, Pose) and Raye Spielberg.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina and Franklin are seemingly the perfect couple, but after five years of marriage, a huge fight at Thanksgiving leads them to divorce, set to be finalised on Christmas day. As they try to move on with their lives, will the festive spirit pull them back together? Starring Erica Ash (Scary Movie 5, Survivor's Remorse) and Eva Marcille (The Young and the Restless).

programme.title: How to Ruin the Holidays
programme.desc: A festive family caper starring Amber Nash (Archer, Mr. Robot) as a struggling comedian who reluctantly returns home for Christmas. Upon her arrival, she must not only deal with her eccentric and wildly dysfunctional family, but ultimately has a life-changing decision to make about her father and special-needs brother.

programme.title: Colorado Christmas
programme.desc: Single mum Melody Miller has left her dream job of teaching music to work as a carer, so that she can better provide for her young daughter. When one of her clients falls ill, his son rushes home, who to Melody's surprise turns out to be none other than country music superstar, Johnny Colorado! As the unlikely pair grow closer, it looks like it could be the start of the perfect Christmas romance, until an old flame of Johnny's arrives at the family ranch....

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: About Time meets The Time Travellers Wife in this coming-of-age sci-fi romance. If you could turn back time, could you win back the love of your life? When physics genius Stillman (Asa Butterfield) is dumped by his girlfriend Debbie (Sophie Turner), he creates a time machine and with his wing-man Evan (Skyler Gisondo) sets off to right every wrong. But some mistakes are too perfect to fix.

programme.title: Hold Your Breath
programme.desc: Set on the rooftops of Paris, this gripping, high concept disaster thriller stars Olga Kurylenko (Quantum of Solace) and Romain Duris (All the money in the world). When an earthquake hits Paris, a deadly toxic mist appears, killing the inhabitants of the city. Surviving in the chaos, Mathieu and Anna must face the fog to save their daughter, who is trapped in a medical tank.

programme.title: Dragon Warriors
programme.desc: Dragons, warriors, orcs, bounty hunters, goblins, wizards, elves, witches, maidens in distress, beautiful princesses, romance, true love, betrayal and magic come together when an unlikely group of heroes embark on a quest to save the land from an evil wizard who has sent a fire-breathing dragon to kill everyone in his realm who has fallen in love.

programme.title: The Vanished
programme.desc: When an unidentified body is discovered in suspicious circumstances, the detective (Yoon Yeon-Seok) in charge of the case calls in an international forensic expert (Olga Kurylenko). Using cutting edge technology, they discover the bodys identity and uncover a sinister conspiracy that finds them reluctantly drawn into the organ trafficking underworld. The pair are forced to face their own fears.

programme.title: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: Chole wishes to bring her college friends back together for a trip to Iceland. Will an unexpected guest and seeing the northern lights, give her the new perspective on life and love? (2020)

programme.title: Two For The Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer prepares for the biggest race of his life all whilst falling for a local ski instructor. Starring Trevor Donovan (2021)

programme.title: A Winter Princess
programme.desc: Princess Carly, working incognito at a ski resort, must team up with the owner's brother, Jesse, to plan the resort's 50th anniversary celebration.

programme.title: Love On Ice
programme.desc: A new coach comes to town and offers a former figure skating champion the opportunity to revive her career and compete for glory. Together, they realise that love can thrive beyond the ice. (2017)

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she's up for the top job at the hospital.

programme.title: The Song To My Heart
programme.desc: After a childhood on the road with her legendary singer-songwriter father, teashop owner BONNIE HIGHSTREET, wants nothing to do with the music business, but when she helps music sensation RYDER JAMISON, develop lyrics for his new solo album, she rekindles her long abandoned dream and falls in love.

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Secret Lives of Second Wives
programme.desc: Starring Andrea Roth, Brian McNamara, and Dan Payne. Lynn finds that marriage the second time around is far from idyllic when her husband's ex-wife and children return to manipulate him.

programme.title: Love Exclusively
programme.desc: When an ambitious reporter is recruited by to play cupid to famous pop musicians Caleb Greene and Carson Peet in return for an exclusive story over Valentine's weekend, she soon realizes Caleb has his sights set on her.

programme.title: Always Worthy
programme.desc: A quirky, aspiring actress is determined to make her dreams come true in Hollywood, but first she's got to overcome her biggest obstacle, herself.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: A sexy, modern telling of Jane Austen's "Persuasion." Wren (Alicia Witt: Orange is the New Black) is a happy, single and self-confessed workaholic who, after rising to the top of the corporate ladder, finds herself coming home to her cat every night.

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: Love Finds You In Charm
programme.desc: A young Amish woman, who isn't satisfied with her path at home, visits a cousin for the summer. Over the summer, she is exposed to another world, finds friendship and more. Soon she must choose and come to terms with the life she wants.

programme.title: A Toast to Love
programme.desc: A marine archeologist finds wine in a shipwreck. If she hopes to save her research program she must discover the love story behind the wine.

programme.title: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: High-school Ag Science teacher Jodi Stafford meets commercial real-estate marketing specialist Mike Jared during her struggle to save her family's ailing dairy farm.

programme.title: Boy in the Attic
programme.desc: Teen girl and mom inherit house, unknowingly housing a hidden boy in the attic.

programme.title: Killer in the Guest House
programme.desc: Gina, a struggling fashion photographer, is forced to rent out her guest house.

programme.title: Death Saved My Life
programme.desc: Jade (Meagan Good) appears perfect but her life is far from idyllic behind doors.

programme.title: Michelle/Troy and Josh
programme.desc: Three masked gunmen burst into Michelle's home.

programme.title: Boy in the Attic
programme.desc: Teen girl and mom inherit house, unknowingly housing a hidden boy in the attic.

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a talented chef and her childhood best friend as she regains her passion for cooking.

programme.title: Love Map
programme.desc: A self-assured relationship columnist is sent on assignment with a prickly tour guide to Florida.

programme.title: Do I Say I Do
programme.desc: Author Jessica Bender is forced to work with her former boyfriend and editor Mike Pryce. During this association, the two ex begin to realize that the spark of their love is not yet completely extinguished.

programme.title: Baby Bootcamp
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Julia is down on her luck, trying to make her baby boot camp a thriving business. To make ends meet, she becomes a part-time nanny for a single widowed father. Trouble is, she knows nothing about taking care of children.

programme.title: Alter
programme.desc: Alter, a psychological thriller about a man who is convinced that he's found his childhood abductor, and is determined to get him to confess by any means necessary.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: Old Western Movie starring John Wayne: Angel and the Badman - Quirt Evans, an all round bad guy, is nursed back to health and sought after by Penelope Worth, a Quaker girl. He eventually finds himself having to choose between his world and the world Penelope lives in.

programme.title: Four Gunmen of the Holy Trinity
programme.desc: Arms trafficking with the Indians on the one hand and acquiring documents concerning the ownership of a goldmine on the other are the principal interests of Quin and Gomez, the highly suspicious guests at Papa Martinez' inn.

programme.title: May God Forgive You... But I Won't
programme.desc: While Cjamango is away from his ranch six bandits attack and kill all the members of his family.

programme.title: Lightning Jack
programme.desc: Lightning Jack Kane is an Australian outlaw in the wild west. During a bungled bank robbery he picks up mute Ben Doyle as a hostage. The two become good friends, with Jack teaching Ben how to rob banks, while they plan Jack's last heist.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP25-28
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Walter Craig is summoned to a British estate. The owner is a stranger to him, yet his face is familiar.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: David Balfour is a recently orphaned young man from a tiny Highland village and the true heir to the title of Master of the Shaws. His uncle Ebenezer has designs on the title so hires Captain Hosean to dispose of his nephew.

programme.title: Clockwise
programme.desc: Brian Stimpson, headmaster, runs his school, as he runs his life, by the clock - until one little slip destroyed his schedule and turned one of the most important days of his life into a disaster.

programme.title: A Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: Leaving to join his wife at a party in the country, Peter misses his train through chatting to an old friend, Marguerite. The two are forced to stop at an inn which only has one room left. But unknown to Peter, he is being pursued by his in-laws!

programme.title: Man in the Moon
programme.desc: Scientists are looking for a man to send up to be the first man on the moon.

programme.title: B grade Twenties
programme.desc: "Hyun-soo." Shocked and devastated, Kyeore quickly begins preparing a new screenplay. Imperfect as it may be, it brings together a group of graduation film team members, capturing their growth and love story."Kyeo-re," a 4th-year student majoring in film directing at an art school, pours her heart and soul into her graduation film screenplay one morning, only to have it stolen by her former boyfriend and senior in the same major,

programme.title: When Romance Meets Destiny
programme.desc: Two brothers, Kwang-Sik and Kwang-Tae, have very different attitudes toward women. Kwang-Sik is extremely shy and can't say a word to a woman. But Kwang-Tae is a playboy who just sleeps around. One day, Kwang-Sik meets Yoon-Kyung for the first time in seven years and he tries to confess his feelings to her, in his own way. Similarly, Kwang-Tae meets Kyung-Jae during a marathon and he tries his own ways on her.At first Kwang-Sik still finds it very difficult to even talk to Yoon-Kyung and Kwang-Tae thinks of Kyung-Jae as yet another temporary conquest, but in each case something changes in the brothers. Will they be able to love this time?

programme.title: Cheese in the Trap
programme.desc: Original Story by: Based on 1.1 Billionview web comics Hong Seol has seen it so long, that creepy and icy cold attitude of Yoo Jung. However, the current Yoo Jung is completely different. He comes up to Hong Seol with a smile on his faceacting like a gentleman asking her if she wants to date with him. Seeing his entirely different manner,Hong Seol is wondering what he is up to.

programme.title: How to steal a dog
programme.desc: Ji-so, a young girl who doesn't have a house because of her bankrupted dad. In order to get money to buy a house she plan to steals wealthy people's dogs to earn reward money when she returns them.

programme.title: Welcome To The Guesthouse
programme.desc: Jun-geun keeps failing at job seeking in cold job market. One day He finds hope through surfing by the beach.

programme.title: Moonlit Winter
programme.desc: Sae-bom finds a mysterious love letter sent to her mom Yun-hee. This letter makes her wonder about Yun-hee.

programme.title: My Mother, The Mermaid
programme.desc: Na-young who arrives at her parents' hometown to find her father is shocked to meet her 20-year old mother.

programme.title: Perfect Game
programme.desc: Two friends who threw their dreams at a world. CHOI Dong-won and SUN Dong-yeol's solitary yet intense matchup!

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: Strawberry Mansion
programme.desc: In the near future an unassuming dream tax auditor gets swept up in a cosmic journey through the life and dreams of an ageing eccentric.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Boneless
programme.desc: On a business trip to Venice, a couple offers a ride to a mysterious hitchhiker. A wrong turn at the worst possible time will lead the protagonists into the middle of an intergalactic war between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Vanity Dies Hard
programme.desc: (1995) Mystery thriller with Eleanor David and Peter Egan. Eyebrows raise when a wealthy woman marries a younger man. But when her disapproving friend vanishes, is an ugly truth about to emerge?

programme.title: Bribery and Corruption
programme.desc: (1997) Mystery thriller starring James D'Arcy. When Nicholas's teenage crush is murdered and his father is the number one suspect, unravelling the truth becomes a family affair...

programme.title: Murder 101
programme.desc: (2007) Crime thriller starring Dick Van Dyke. The kidnapping of a prize racehorse throws a criminology professor and a private detective into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: Murder 101
programme.desc: (2007) Crime drama starring Dick Van Dyke. A new age guru is found dead in a locked room, surrounded by his followers in a deep trance. Can a criminology professor unravel this mesmerising mystery?

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries: A Beautiful Place To Die
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller starring Jesse Metcalfe. A retired detective's quiet life is shattered when a body washes up to shore, but can he track down the murderer?

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: John Skillpa, a quiet bank clerk living in tiny Peacock, Nebraska, prefers to live an invisible life. This might have to do with John's secret: he has another personality no one knows about, a woman who each morning cooks him breakfast before he starts his day. Then, in a moment, everything changes.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: Dark Minds
programme.desc: A twisted psychological thriller about a man haunted by his past.

programme.title: The Baker
programme.desc: A hitman's new rural life is threatened when his old bosses come to town. An action-packed comedy starring Damian Lewis.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Union Bound
programme.desc: Union Bound is a thrilling Civil War film that shows the strength and courage of the human spirit. Sergeant Joseph Hoover went to war to preserve the Union but finds himself captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Ivanhoe (1982)
programme.desc: Sir Walter Scott's epic novel of timeless romance and knightly daring comes to life! The year is 1194. At long last, the noble knight Wilfred of Ivanhoe (Anthony Andrews) has returned from the Crusades to regain his title and win the hand of his beloved Lady Rowena (Lysette Anthony).

programme.title: All The Money in The World
programme.desc: After the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III, in a race against time, his mother works to convince his wealthy grandfather to pay the ransom. Inspired by historical events. Certain scenes, characters and dialogue have been fictionalized for dramatic purposes.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A symbologist is caught in an ancient web of secrecy and uncovers the truth about The Holy Grail.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: I Can Only Imagine
programme.desc: It's the song that brings ultimate hope to so many...often in the midst of life s most challenging moments.

programme.title: The War Below
programme.desc: During World War I, a group of British miners are recruited to tunnel underneath no man's land and set bombs from below the German front in hopes of breaking the deadly stalemate of the Battle of Messines.

programme.title: Loving Vincent
programme.desc: Vincent Willem van Gogh is undoubtedly one of the most famous and influential figures in the history of Western art. Yet during his lifetime Vincent struggled with poverty and depression, dying at only 37 years old.

programme.title: Instrument of War
programme.desc: Instrument Of War is an harrowing yet uplifting true story about survival against seemingly impossible odds. When U.S. B-24 bomber pilot Clair Cline is shot down and captured in northern Germany, one war ends and another begins -- to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.
